title: Insert at Beginning of Singly Linked List

content.problemStatement:
You are given a singly linked list containing NNN nodes.

Your task is to insert a new node at the beginning of the linked list and then display the updated list.

Each node of the linked list contains an integer value `DATA` and a pointer to the next node.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
The value 5 is inserted at the beginning of the linked list, so it becomes the new head.
